how: real in-app Game Review (strong quality, Stockfish 17 lite, baseline parityConfig after PR repair)
notes: Tags PASS (delta 6 <= 8): blunders/misses/books align; deltas are adjacent-tier best<->great disagreements. Accuracy w FAILS (49.8 vs 66.6, delta 16.8 > 8): chess.com CAPS is more generous to the winning side in short decisive games — the real tuning target is the game-accuracy aggregation + rating mapping, NOT the classification bins.
